steps.title: Pin down what's needed
steps.content: The example must illustrate a species being entirely absent at particular times — i.e., zero observations across the listed months on the graph.

steps.title: Match to the option with zero observations across all listed periods
steps.content:
Choices A, B, and D each name a single month — they could illustrate one absence, but the strongest example uses multiple time points where the count was zero, supporting at particular times of the year.

C: zero three-lined rainbowfish in January, April, and July of 2001 — three distinct months of zero observations, which most effectively illustrates the seasonal absence pattern. C is correct.
